title: noccaea lutescens
intro: Noccaea lutescens, also known as Yellow Gypsophila or Yellow Penny Cress, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Noccaea lutescens include its ability to aid in the relief of congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Noccaea lutescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for its medicinal purposes.
